summary: Clear audience recording highlights Phil's crisp bass and Jerry's consistent guitar, delivering an uplifting show that some find a bit unfocused.
review: The three‑mic audience source captures Phil Lesh’s bass with notable clarity and gives Jerry Garcia’s guitar more presence than many soundboard tapes. Most listeners rave about the “space” vibe and overall joy of the performance, though one reviewer notes the set feels fun yet unfocused and a bit rushed.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews praise both the musical vibe and clear audio, while a single 3‑star review calls the show unfocused; combined with good audience recording quality yields an overall rating around 4.2.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Audience tape is praised for clear Phil Lesh bass and more consistent Jerry Garcia guitar compared to typical soundboard recordings; no major flaws reported.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Generally fun and uplifting, but one reviewer felt the performance was unfocused and rushed at times.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Guitar heard more consistently than on soundboard recordings (positive).
band_member_comments.Phil: Bass comes through very clear in this audience source (positive).
